flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at New England Institute of Technology rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.8k → $37.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at New England Institute of Technology rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.8k → $37.3k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at New England Institute of Technology rose 211% between 2023 and 2024 (23.8% → 74.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at New England Institute of Technology fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.2% → 0.0%).
